message:
feat(mcp): generate hierarchical child IDs for sub-issues

When creating an issue with a parent via MCP, generate deterministic
hierarchical child IDs (e.g., parent.1, parent.2) using next_child_number()
and child_id() utilities instead of hash-based IDs. Also moves parent
validation before ID generation and computes content_hash before persist.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
